mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (post_id, user_id, comment_content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{commentContent})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY comment_date DESC
SELECT comment_id, post_id, user_id, comment_content, comment_date, comment_last_modified FROM comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
SELECT * FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY comment_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET comment_content = #{commentContent}, comment_last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
